prestazioni: Engine swap to a **ZMZ-51432 CRS** (2.2L turbo-diesel, 150 HP stock) with a **Garrett GT2260S** turbocharger (0.63 A/R, 60mm compressor inducer) paired with a **Bosch CP3 high-pressure fuel pump** (1600 bar) and **Denso G4S injectors** (320cc/min) for a target of 220 HP at 3800 RPM and 420 Nm at 2000 RPM. Supporting mods include a **Niterra (NGK) iridium spark plug set (ILKAR7B11)** for diesel glow plug reliability and a **Mann+Hummel ProVent 200** oil separator to prevent turbo oil contamination.

Full **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** (mandrel-bent, 1.5mm wall thickness) with a **Bosal 254-200** 3-chamber muffler (straight-through design, 30% backpressure reduction) and a **Scorpion V-band downpipe** (T3 flange, 3.5-inch outlet) to optimize turbo spool. The system includes a **Walker 85430** catalytic converter (200-cell, Euro 6 compliant) for emissions retention.

Suspension overhaul with **KW Adventure 3.1 coilovers** (24-way rebound damping, 40mm lift, 350mm travel) and **Polyurethane bushings (SuperPro SP0116K)** for the front control arms and rear leaf spring shackles. The rear axle is reinforced with **UAZ-approved heavy-duty U-bolts (Part #3160-2403070-10)** and **Bilstein B8 5100 shocks** (monotube, 46mm piston) for high-load durability. A **custom 3-link rear suspension kit (Ironman 4x4)** replaces the stock leaf springs for articulation gains.
estetica: Full **Rigid Industries SR-Series LED light bar (50-inch, 20,000 lumens)** mounted on a **Slee Off-Road aluminum roof rack (UAZ Patriot-specific, 150kg load rating)** with **PIAA LP570 fog lights** (55W HID, 4500K) integrated into the front bumper. The bumper is replaced with a **ARB Deluxe Bull Bar (Part #3520020)** with a **Warn Zeon 10-S winch (10,000lb, synthetic rope)** and **custom powder-coated (RAL 9005 Jet Black) finish**.

Body armor includes **Rock Sliders (Body Armor 4x4, UAZ Patriot-specific)** with **3/16-inch steel plating** and **Rhino Linings spray-on bedliner** (80 mils, textured) for the lower rocker panels. The hood is replaced with a **custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon CF, 3K weave, 2x2 twill)** featuring a **functional scoop (3-inch rise, 6061 aluminum)** to direct airflow to the **Mishimoto MMINT-UAZ-16 oil cooler**.

Wheels are **Method MR701 VT-Spec (17x9, +12mm offset, beadlock-ready)** wrapped in **BFGoodrich KM3 tires (285/70R17, 10-ply, 33-inch)** mounted on **Hub Centric Rings (66.5mm to 73.1mm)**. The fender flares are **Bushwacker Cut-Out (UAZ Patriot-specific, 3-inch extension)** with **custom rivet installation (Stainless Steel, 1/4-inch)** and **PVC coating (Line-X XS-100)** for durability. The rear spare tire is relocated to a **Smittybilt XRC Gen3 Swing-Out Tire Carrier (Part #76850)** with a **custom jerry can holder (RotopaX 5-gallon, dual mount)**.
